creator: danfe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Siva Mahadevan from comment #4)
> This bug can be closed as the latest version in ports is 0.9.8.5.
It had been closed originally but I reopened it since I wanted to commit a follow-up update because there were some run-time issues with committed version at that time.  I still have commit message template with the details, just need to pull myself to finish the work.

> Although it is marked as BROKEN and there are newer versions upstream, that
> can be tracked in a separate bug.
Or we can try to conserve PR numbers and keep it open for a little longer. :-)
